title: ayenia peninsularis
intro: Ayenia peninsularis, also known as the peninsular ayenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its alkaloid and saponin content. The health benefits of Ayenia peninsularis include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, due to its immunomodulatory and antiseptic effects. Ayenia peninsularis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
